## Problem

Which problem is affected? (e.g. LeetCode 0001 Two Sum)

## Language

- [ ] JavaScript
- [ ] Python
- [ ] C#

## Description

What is wrong with the solution?

## Expected behavior

What should it do instead?

## Additional context

Any test cases, edge cases, or references.
